SUMMARY

This is AI generated summarization, which may have errors. For context, always refer to the full article.

MANILA, Philippines – Team Philippines’ campaign in the Paris Olympics is down to its final day with three more athletes competing on Saturday, August 10.

Here is Team Philippines’ schedule (Manila time):

Bianca Pagdanganan falls short of a historic medal as she finishes at joint fourth with three others in the Paris Olympics women’s golf competition.

Dottie Ardina ends up at joint 13th as she and Pagdanganan both shoot a 4-under 68 in the fourth and final round.

New Zealand’s Lydia Ko captures the elusive Olympic gold with a 278 after settling for silver in the 2016 Rio de Janeiro Games and bronze in the Tokyo Olympics three years ago.

Bianca Pagdanganan propels herself to medal contention as she completes the fourth and final round of the Paris Olympics women’s golf competition.

Pagdanganan is currently at joint third after firing a 4-under 68 for a 282 aggregate.

Dottie Ardina also finishes strong with a 68 to end with a 285 total.

Vanessa Sarno ends her Olympic debut with a DNF (did not finish) as she fails to make a lift in the snatch portion of the women’s 71kg division.

Sarno uses up all her three attempts at 100kg but to no success.

Read the full storyhere.

Vanessa Sarnohopes to continue the Philippines’ medal streak in Olympic weightlifting as she competes in the women’s 71kg division.

The last out of the three Filipino weightlifters to see action, Sarno aims to follow in the footsteps of Hidilyn Diaz, who won gold in the Tokyo Games three years ago after she bagged silver in the 2016 Rio de Janeiro Olympics.

Bianca Pagdanganan and Dottie Ardinamake their last push for a historic golf medal as they play in the fourth and final round of the women’s individual stroke play.– Rappler.com

title: HIGHLIGHTS, RESULTS: Team Philippines, 2024 Paris Olympics – August 10
author: delfin.dioquino editor
description: Weightlifter Vanessa Sarno and golfers Bianca Pagdanganan and Dottie Ardina wrap up Team Philippines' campaign in the Paris Olympics
